class.name: PlayFabUser
class.description: Represents a signed-in PlayFab session associated with either one local Xbox user or one title-defined custom id. Custom-ID sessions have an entity key but no local Xbox user handle, so Game Saves APIs reject them with [code]xbox_user_required[/code].

method.name: get_local_id
method.description: Returns the local Xbox user id associated with this PlayFab session, or [code]0[/code] for custom-ID sessions.

method.name: get_custom_id
method.description: Returns the custom id associated with this PlayFab session, or an empty string for Xbox-backed sessions.

method.name: get_entity_key
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity key as a [Dictionary] with [code]id[/code] and [code]type[/code] entries.

method.name: has_local_user_handle
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when this session is backed by a local Xbox user handle required by Game Saves.

members.member: The local Xbox user id associated with this PlayFab session, or [code]0[/code] for custom-ID sessions.
The custom id associated with this PlayFab session, or an empty string for Xbox-backed sessions.
The PlayFab entity key as a dictionary containing [code]id[/code] and [code]type[/code].
Whether this session has the local Xbox user handle required by Game Saves.
